description: Configure a multi-rate cost structure for the resource 'Alice Johnson' and apply it to a specific task. Alice usually bills at $85/hr (Standard Rate A), but for security auditing work, she bills at a specialist rate of $150/hr (Rate B). Update the resource 'Alice Johnson' to include a Standard Rate of $150.00/hr in Rate Table B. Assign 'Alice Johnson' to the 'Security Audit' task (Task ID 11) and ensure this specific assignment uses Rate Table B for cost calculation. Save the project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/security_audit_costing.xml.
